diffs.diff:
--- a/explore5.py
+++ b/explore5.py
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+import sys

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+

+import inspect

+from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras, get_rays

+

+print('=== get_spherical_cameras FULL source ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras))

+

+print('\n=== get_rays FULL source ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(get_rays))

+

+# Also check the TSR.render method to see how cameras are used

+from tsr.system import TSR

+print('\n=== TSR.render FULL source ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))

+

+# Check the renderer config for fovy

+from tsr.system import TSRConfig

+print('\n=== TSRConfig ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(TSRConfig))
